sections.name: Hero
sections.description: H1 with case-type settlement proof or risk-removal framing, trust chips, attorney photo, and a 4-field free case evaluation form above the fold.

sections.name: How It Works
sections.description: Three-step process (Submit, We Investigate, We Fight) that sets expectations before {brand_short} asks for anything else.

sections.name: Settlement Results Bar
sections.description: Horizontal grid of dollar figures tagged by case type, the first proof {owner_first} shows a stressed visitor.

sections.name: Press Band
sections.description: Media logos or local award badges that show {brand_short} has been recognised beyond its own marketing.

sections.name: Why Choose Us
sections.description: Risk-removal bullets: no fee unless we win, available 24/7, direct attorney access, not a settlement mill.

sections.name: Practice Areas Grid
sections.description: One card per case type with a dollar result and one-line description, linking to {service_count} separate case-type pages.

sections.name: Founder Story
sections.description: {owner_first}'s photo and personal origin story, answering the 'why should I trust this firm' question.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.description: Named clients with photo, case type, and outcome where available.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.description: Plain-language answers to the questions people search after an accident, tagged with FAQPage schema.

sections.name: Final CTA Band
sections.description: Last conversion push before the footer, repeating the no-win-no-fee promise.

sections.name: Page hero
sections.description: Short intro establishing who {brand_short} is and who they fight for.

sections.name: Founder Story (expanded)
sections.description: {owner_first}'s full origin story and what led them into personal injury law.

sections.name: Why Choose Us
sections.description: Risk-removal bullets restated for a visitor doing deeper research.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.description: Client stories that back up the founder narrative.

sections.name: Page hero
sections.description: Short intro to {brand_short}'s practice areas.

sections.name: Practice Areas Grid
sections.description: All {service_count} case-type cards, each linking to its own landing page.

sections.name: Page hero
sections.description: Short intro framing the review section as real outcomes for real clients.

sections.name: Testimonials (full grid)
sections.description: Every available client review, with photo, case type, and outcome where possible.

sections.name: Page hero
sections.description: Short intro reassuring the visitor these are real answers, not a sales pitch.

sections.name: FAQ (full list)
sections.description: All frequently asked questions about cost, process, case value, and timelines, tagged with FAQPage schema.

sections.name: Page hero
sections.description: Short intro inviting the visitor to reach out any time, day or night.

sections.name: Contact details
sections.description: Address, phone, hours (Open 24/7), and a map.

sections.name: Free Case Evaluation form
sections.description: The same 4-field lead form used on the homepage.

sections.name: Page hero
sections.description: Short intro framing the blog as plain-language help, not legal jargon.

sections.name: Blog grid
sections.description: Cards for each post: cover image, title, excerpt, date, and category.

sections.name: Office Locations grid (multi-office firms only)
sections.description: {brand_short} does not ship separate location pages unless it operates from {city_count} or more offices. Multi-office firms get an Office Locations grid added to the About page; single-office firms omit this section entirely.

sections.name: {service_name} hero
sections.description: H1: '{service_name} Lawyer in {city} | {brand_short}'. Large settlement figure for this case type, rendered in accent yellow with tabular-nums.

sections.name: Risk removal band
sections.description: Restates 'No win, no fee. Available 24/7.' directly below the hero.

sections.name: Settlement stat
sections.description: Single large dollar figure specific to {service_name} cases.

sections.name: Case explainer
sections.description: What to do after a {service_name} accident, and what compensation typically covers.

sections.name: Case-specific FAQ
sections.description: Three to five FAQ items specific to {service_name}, tagged with FAQPage and BreadcrumbList schema.

sections.name: CTA band + Free Case Evaluation form
sections.description: Final conversion push with the same 4-field lead form, repeated for {service_name} visitors.

sections.name: Car Accident hero
sections.description: Separate landing page for car accident searches, the niche's highest-volume case-type query.

sections.name: Truck Accident hero
sections.description: Separate landing page for truck and commercial vehicle accident searches.

sections.name: Wrongful Death hero
sections.description: Separate, carefully-worded landing page for families researching a wrongful death claim.
